faqs.question: Tell me about Luca?
faqs.answer:
Luca Nguyen is a fullstack developer with 3+ years of experience building high-performance web apps. He lives at the intersection of frontend and backend with TypeScript — crafting clean, scalable React interfaces and reliable Node.js APIs that ship to production.

His current focus: technical SEO, performance optimization, and AI-powered features. He specializes in Next.js, React, NestJS, and PostgreSQL.

Off the keyboard, he's into coffee, guitar, and exploring new technologies.

faqs.question: What projects has Luca built?
faqs.answer:
Here are some highlights from Luca's project work:

1. Ling's Home — Digital service management platform serving 100+ businesses (Next.js, PostgreSQL, Stripe).
2. EduVance Platform — AI-powered EdTech with personalized learning paths and RAG pipelines (FastAPI, Python, GenAI, AWS).
3. Performance Dashboard — Real-time analytics with technical SEO tracking, improving page loads by 60% (Next.js, D3.js).
4. Design System UI Library — Reusable component library that cut dev time by 40% (React, Storybook, TypeScript).
5. E-commerce Platform — Full transaction flow with Stripe and real-time inventory sync (Next.js, PostgreSQL, Redis).

Open the projects.js tab to dig into the details.

faqs.question: Tell me about his work experience
faqs.answer:
Luca's professional journey:

• 2025 - Present — Junior Software Developer @ EduVanceAI. Building intelligent backends, ML personalization, and RAG pipelines serving thousands of learners daily.

• Jun 2023 – Aug 2023 — User Experience Designer @ Zepto Digital Labs. Designed UI for a simulation platform using design thinking and UX research.

• Jun 2023 – Jul 2023 — Back End Intern @ Laser Technologies Pvt Ltd. Maintained backend systems and databases for enterprise web applications.

Check experience.ts for the full timeline.

faqs.question: What's his tech stack?
faqs.answer:
Luca's primary stack:

Languages & Markup: TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3
Frontend: React, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn/ui, Redux, React Query, Styled Components
Backend: Node.js, Express.js, NestJS
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL
Hosting & Cloud: Render, Clever Cloud, AWS
Tools: Git, NPM, Prettier

Open skills.json for the full breakdown with proficiency levels.

faqs.question: How can I contact Luca?
faqs.answer:
Easiest ways to reach Luca:

• Email: luca.nguyen@example.com
• Telegram: @luca_nguyen
• LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/luca
• GitHub: github.com/luca

He typically responds within 24 hours. The contact.css tab has a form too if you'd rather drop a message there.

faqs.question: How can I support Luca?
faqs.answer:
Sweet of you to ask. A few easy ways to support Luca:

• ⭐ Star his projects on GitHub (github.com/luca).
• 🔁 Share his work with folks who'd find it useful.
• 💬 Connect on LinkedIn and engage with his posts.
• 💼 Refer him for interesting frontend / backend / fullstack roles.
• ☕ Buy him a coffee — he runs on it.

Genuine feedback on his projects is always welcome.
